name: Stuffed Grape Leaves (Vegetarian)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the grape leaves and rinse under cold water, then drain again.
2. Fill each grape leaf with a mixture of rice, onion, parsley, tomatoes, pine nuts, raisins, cinnamon or allspice, garlic, and pepper to taste.
3. Place a heaping teaspoon of filling on each leaf. Fold the edges over and arrange the little bundles side by side in a frying pan with a lid.
4. Mix together olive oil and water, then pour over the grape leaves. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
5. Cook covered over a very gentle heat for 2-2 1/2 hours, adding more water if necessary, until the rice and leaves are tender. Cool, then chill.
6. Arrange the stuffed leaves on a large plate or in a shallow basket with a bowl of yogurt and mint dressing in the middle to dip the leaves into. Garnish with lemon slices.
Yogurt and Mint Dressing:
About 1/2 cup yogurt and 2 tablespoons chopped mint mixed together.
